meaning: v.(使)异种交配,(使)混种,(使)杂种繁殖
examples: Eventually the subpopulations become so genetically distinct that they cannot interbreed even if the physical barriers between them were removed.
High rates of straying can be problematic because misdirected fish may interbreed with the existing stock to such a degree that any local adaptations that are present become diluted.
Species are things that interbreed and have fertile offspring.
